blocker: Full grid 42x5x5=1050 episodes (~50 min) exceeds the ~15-min model-run cap; shipped the full runnable grid script (run_full_grid.py --per-family 0 --seeds 5, resumable .partial checkpoint) + a real representative subset + A1's full-42x3-seed reference instead of fabricating 900 episodes.
one_line: Built/ran the full pass@k grid wrapper (run_full_grid.py over rex.eval_pass_at_k); ran a real 6-incident x5-condition x5-seed subset (150 episodes, 0 errors, 430s, floor_ok) on glm-5p2 with the deterministic judge: rex pass@1=0.967 [0.83,0.99] vs zero_shot 0.333 [0.19,0.51] (disjoint Wilson CIs), matching A1; full 1050-episode grid deferred off-cap as documented blocker
